title: Test your IQ and win a prize! 🏆
subtitle: Solve every clue and fill the grid. Across & Down 33 entries.

words.clue: I speak all languages but have no tongue. I connect every nation but own no passport.
I travel where clocks become liars. A father leaves today and returns tomorrow. What am I?
I once defeated an entire army with only ten arrows.
I build towers but rarely live inside them.
A lonely voice crossed the stars. The answer came before the question.
The king who never wore a crown, yet Dalal Street called him royalty.
I never owned a cow, yet I changed the milk of a nation.
I have four letters, millions watch me, and ninety minutes decide my fate.
Fifty soldiers march together. If their leader stumbles, the market trembles.
Small feet, giant shadows.
Before they landed, they already spoke.
I am born from numbers, worshipped by traders, and feared by investors.
Walk forward to meet me, walk backward to understand me.
I enter your house without doors, build cities without bricks, and steal ideas without touching your head.
When everyone attacked, I built walls.
The air itself waits before I jump.
One man dreamed of stars, another taught a nation, both carried the same name.
Invisible roads carry voices because of me.
I sleep during the day and become valuable at night.
While others spun stories, I delivered thunder.
I am a tower that nobody lives in and a road that nobody sees.
I launched fire into the sky but taught children to dream.
Before India learned to believe, one man lifted a cup that nobody expected him to touch.
I rise without wings and fall without wounds. Millions celebrate or cry because of my mood.
I lost my freedom so millions could gain theirs. My classroom had no walls, and my students became a nation.
Without legs I travel, without eyes I guide, without a mouth I speak.
Cities run beneath my signature.
By the time defenders wake up, I have already reached tomorrow.
I often arrived late, spoke little, and left with the trophy.
Einstein bends me. Nolan films me. Cooper fears me.
Once I lived in every pocket and survived many falls.
I entered late but changed everyone's language.
The shuttle and racket become friends for a second too long. That friendship is my crime.
